shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Full-balanced, beef and turkey protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Bonnie Beef and Turkey Adult Cat Canned Food , fully-balanced, beef and turkey protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
